title: crataegus javorkae
intro: Crataegus javorkae, also known as the Javorka's hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Crataegus javorkae include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving heart function, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Crataegus javorkae are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them as a tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or capsule.
